no: Loretakers by Acifer Known warning: ADD_WORLDMAP_LINKS uses invalid from_node (~N~), WeiDU defaults to all nodes. Non-fatal, travel links work correctly.
sum: Quest mod adding a new 2-level dungeon beneath Baldur's Gate city with fresh areas, enemies, and quests for approximately 1-2 hours of gameplay.

co.no: INSTALL ISSUE: %CentralSewers%.are not found. Loretakers sets CentralSewers = BG0225 (EET) or AR0225 (BGEE) via conditional GAME_IS blocks. If neither condition matches at install time (e.g. unexpected engine state), the variable is never set and COPY_EXISTING ~%CentralSewers%.are~ fails. Also possible: BG0225.are is not accessible if BG1 content has not been merged yet. Ensure Loretakers installs after EET world-build (wb:1) so BG1 areas are available.
